title: chargeback — published macros
description: No published macros. The chargeback module operates purely through service classes (ChargebackOrchestrator / EvidenceCollector / EvidenceSubmitter / RdrHandler / Ce3EvidenceBuilder / ChargebackRateCalculator / NetworkFeeCalculator / ClawbackCoordinator) invoked from HTTP controllers + CLI commands + event listeners. There is no per-request chargeback context that would justify a Request macro — a chargeback is created by webhook OR by the CreateChargebackFromDisputeLost cascade, not by an authenticated end-user request.
namespace_note: No macros; documented for symmetry with the module family.
rationale: Referrals ships Request::activeReferralProgram / Request::inboundReferral macros because there IS a request-boundary concept — the referral cookie carries context across requests. Chargebacks have no equivalent — chargebacks are bank-initiated + webhook-triggered, not carried in the request.
The customer-facing chargeback UI does not exist — chargebacks are admin-only surface. No customer request context to expose.
The admin-facing chargeback UI + CLI pass every parameter explicitly. No implicit context needed.
